U

UPDATE_AVAIL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
UPDATE AVAILABLE CARDS message type
UPDATE_DECK - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
UPDATE DECK message type
UPDATE_KINGDOM - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
UPDATE KINGDOM message type
UPDATE_LOBBY - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
UPDATE_LOBBY message type
updateAvailable(String, Resource, String, List<Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the updatesAvailableCardView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
updateAvailable(String, Resource, String, List<Integer>) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the updatesAvailable method sends to the player the new available cards on the field.
UpdateAvailableView - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns
This message is sent to the client to update the available cards in the view.
UpdateAvailableView(MessageId, String, Resource, String, List<Integer>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.UpdateAvailableView
Constructor.
updateDeckView(String, Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the updatesDeckView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
updateDeckView(String, Resource) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the updatesDeckView sends to the player the top of the resource or gold deck, based on which one is requested.
UpdateDeckView - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns
This message is sent to the client to update the deck in the view.
UpdateDeckView(MessageId, String, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.turns.UpdateDeckView
Constructor.
updateHandAndDeckView(String, Resource, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
updateHandAndDeckView(String, Resource, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method updates the player's hand and the new top of the deck right after the player has drawn a card from the deck.
updateInitialPhase(List<Integer>, List<Integer>, int, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, Resource, Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the sendInitial method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
updateInitialPhase(List<Integer>, List<Integer>, int, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, List<Integer>, Resource, Resource) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the sendInitial method sends to the player the starting setup of the game, including the available gold and resource cards on the field, the top of the decks, his hand, his starting card, the public and private objectives.
updateKingdom(StandardCard, Side, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Kingdom
The updateKingdom(sidePlaced, position) method is called every time the player successfully places a Card and invokes private methods that update the current state of the Kingdom.
updateKingdom(String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the updatesPlayersKingdomView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
updateKingdom(String, int, String, Position) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the updatesPlayersKingdomView method places a card and update the View of the player right after placing it, either if it's a starting card or another card.
UpdateKingdomMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed
This message is used to update the kingdom of a player.
UpdateKingdomMessage(MessageId, String, int, String, Position) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.UpdateKingdomMessage
Constructor of the message.
UpdateLobbyMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby
This message is sent by the server to the client when a player joins the lobby.
UpdateLobbyMessage(MessageId, String, List<String>, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.UpdateLobbyMessage
Constructor.
updateLobbyView(Player, List<Player>, int, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the updateLobbyView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
updateLobbyView(Player, List<Player>, int, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the updateLobbyView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
updateLobbyView(Player, List<Player>, int, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the updateLobbyView method is called when the player wants infos about the lobby.
updateLobbyView(String, List<String>, int, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the updateLobbyView method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
updateLobbyView(String, List<String>, int, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the updateLobbyView method sends to the player all the infos about the lobby, for example the nicknames of the players in the lobby, the number of players in the lobby or the maximum capacity of the lobby.
updatePlayerHandAndDeckView(String, Resource, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
updatePlayerHandAndDeckView(String, Resource, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
updatePlayerHandAndDeckView(String, Resource, int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the updatePlayerHandAndDeckView method is called right after the player has drawn a card, to have an update of his hand and of the new top of deck.
updatesAvailableCardView(String, Resource, String, List<StandardCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the updatesAvailableCardView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
updatesAvailableCardView(String, Resource, String, List<StandardCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the updatesAvailableCardView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
updatesAvailableCardView(String, Resource, String, List<StandardCard>) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the updatesAvailableCardView method is called by the player to see the available cards.
updatesDeckView(String, Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the updatesDeckView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
updatesDeckView(String, Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the updatesDeckView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
updatesDeckView(String, Resource) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the updatesDeckView is called by the player to see the top of the decks.
updatesPlayersKingdomView(Player, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the updatesPlayersKingdomView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
updatesPlayersKingdomView(Player, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the updatesPlayersKingdomView method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
updatesPlayersKingdomView(Player, int, String, Position) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the updatesPlayersKingdomView method is called to place a card and update the View of the player right after placing i, either if it's a starting card or another card.
